luna_greet.text: I... I tried to share my art online but nobody noticed. Maybe it's not good enough...

choices.label: Your art matters. Can I see it?
choices.response: R-really? *shows sketchbook* Thank you for asking. That means a lot.

choices.label: Their loss! More art for us!
choices.response: Haha! I never thought of it that way... Maybe I'll keep drawing!

choices.label: Take your time. Art isn't a race.
choices.response: ...you're right. I was putting too much pressure on myself. Thanks.

luna_greet.helped: I posted my art today and someone left a nice comment! Thank you, Shogo!

kai_greet.text: Everyone expects me to have it all figured out. I don't even know what I want...

choices.label: It's okay not to know yet.
choices.response: You really think so? Maybe that's okay... Thanks, Shogo.

choices.label: Nobody has it figured out!
choices.response: Wait... really? Even adults? That's actually comforting!

choices.label: No rush. Life's not a speedrun.
choices.response: A speedrun... heh. Maybe I should just play the game.

kai_greet.helped: I started journaling about things I enjoy. Small steps! Thanks for believing in me.

mira_greet.text: Hi... I just moved here and don't know anyone. Everyone already has their groups...

choices.label: Welcome! You've got a friend now.
choices.response: Just like that?! You have no idea how much I needed that. Thank you!

choices.label: Solo queue is where it's at!
choices.response: Did you just use gaming terms? I like your vibe. Let's duo queue!

choices.label: This town is really warm.
choices.response: I can feel it already. Especially talking to you.

mira_greet.helped: I made two more friends today! This town really is special!

rex_greet.text: I can't write a single song. Maybe the music just... left me.

choices.label: It's just resting. Like you should.
choices.response: Resting... I never gave myself permission to breathe. Thanks, Shogo.

choices.label: Writer's block? More like a nap!
choices.response: Writer's NAP?! That made me laugh. First time in days!

choices.label: Creativity comes in waves.
choices.response: Between waves... the ocean isn't gone. Just waiting.

rex_greet.helped: I wrote something today! Rough, but it's SOMETHING! Thanks for the rest advice.

vedi_greet.text: Hey Shogo! Beautiful day, huh? I was just thinking about heading to the lake later.

choices.label: Let's go together!
choices.response: Yeah! That sounds perfect. You always make things better just by being there.

choices.label: It really is a nice day.
choices.response: Right? Sometimes you just gotta stop and notice. Glad I have you for that.

choices.label: Have you eaten yet?
choices.response: ...no. Thanks for always checking on me, seriously.

vedi_greet.helped: You know what? Having you as a best friend is the best thing about this town.

vedi_home.text: Welcome to my place! Make yourself at home. Want to just hang out for a bit?

choices.label: Always!
choices.response: This is what life's about, right? Just... being here. Together.

choices.label: Your place feels so warm.
choices.response: That's because you're in it! ...Okay that was cheesy but I meant it.

vedi_home.helped: Just chilling here. Some days that's all you need.

comfort_npc.text: Welcome to Comfort House! This is a safe space for everyone. Feel free to relax.

studio_npc.text: Welcome to the Creator Studio! Creativity flows best when you're relaxed.

booth_npc.text: This is the Voice Booth! Whether singing or speaking, your words matter.

arena_npc1.text: Deadlines are coming and I can barely keep up... but having a good leader helps.

choices.label: Let's break it into steps.
choices.response: That... actually makes it feel manageable. Thanks!

choices.label: Take a breath first.
choices.response: You're right. I forget to breathe sometimes.

arena_npc1.helped: Things are going smoother now! Thanks for the leadership.

arena_npc2.text: I disagree with Alex on the approach. We need to think bigger!

choices.label: Both ideas have merit.
choices.response: I guess combining approaches could work...

choices.label: Let's hear everyone out.
choices.response: Fair enough. I'll listen first.

arena_npc2.helped: We found a compromise! Teamwork wins.

arena_npc3.text: I just want everyone to get along... the arguing stresses me out.

choices.label: You're the heart of this team.
choices.response: Really? That means so much...

choices.label: It'll work out. I promise.
choices.response: I believe you. Thanks for being here.

arena_npc3.helped: The team feels so much better now! Harmony achieved.

luna_quest_start.text: I found this beautiful little spot on the hilltop... wildflowers everywhere! You should go see it. It's north of here, past the garden area.

luna_quest_done.text: You went! What was it like? ...That beautiful, huh? I'm going to paint it tomorrow. Thank you for going, Shogo.

kai_quest_start.text: Ugh... I lost my journal somewhere near the crossroads. I wrote all my thoughts in it. Could you help me look? It should be near the main path intersection.

kai_quest_done.text: You found it! *hugs journal* All my thoughts were in here. I was so worried... Thank you, Shogo. Really.

mira_quest_start.text: I want to make my new place feel like home! Could you find some flowers for me? There are pretty ones growing around town.

mira_quest_done.text: Oh! These are gorgeous! My room is going to feel so warm now. You really helped me feel at home here.

rex_quest_start.text: I need new sounds for a song. Real ones, not digital. Could you go listen to the lake and the birds, then tell me what you hear?

rex_quest_done.text: Lake waves and birdsong... I can hear it already! *starts humming* This is going to be my best song yet!

vedi_lake_start.text: Hey! Let's go to the lake together. I heard the water is really clear today. Walk with me?

vedi_lake_walk.text: Look at the light on the water... It's so calm here. Let's find a good spot to sit.

vedi_lake_spot.text: This is perfect. Just... listen. *sits down* Sometimes the best conversations are just being quiet together.

vedi_lake_done.text: Thanks for coming with me. These little moments... they mean more than you know.

vedi_stars_start.text: I heard there's an amazing view from the eastern hills! Let's go explore together. It'll be worth it!

vedi_stars_hill.text: We're getting higher! Look, you can see the whole town from here. Keep going!

vedi_stars_top.text: Wow... you can see everything from up here. The town, the lake, the trees... It all looks so small and peaceful.

vedi_stars_done.text: Same sky, same stars... but it feels different when you're up here with someone. Thanks for always being here, Shogo.

vedi_residential.text: Shogo! Ready for the day? The scooty is in the garage if you want to head out.

vedi_after_ride.text: That ride was amazing! My hair's a mess, but it was worth it. Let's do that again soon.

vedi_highway_talk.text: The air out here is so different... cleaner. Sometimes you just need to keep moving to feel still, you know?
